summary: Frontend-only test of Reviews/testimonials feature on Java Backend Academy static SPA. All 14 review requirements verified: section renders with correct testids, 3 seed reviews navigable with counter 01/03→03/03 (wraps), star rating (readonly + interactive) works, dialog opens/closes on Escape, all 3 validations fire (empty name, <12 char comment, 0 rating), 5-star input toggles correctly (click star-4 then star-2 leaves 2 filled), batch select has 10 options (8 courses + placeholder + Multiple courses), month inputs are type=month, submit with unconfigured endpoint shows 'Reviews endpoint isn't configured yet' toast and preserves form. Security check passed: no Google Sheet URLs in /app/frontend/src. Apps Script file has doGet (approved=TRUE filter), doPost (approved=FALSE), and CacheService rate limiting. README section 5 exists. Regression: all nav testids, course-row-01/08, map iframe, mobile menu present; no horizontal overflow at 390/768/1440.
critical_code_review_comments: REVIEWS_API_URL fallback comment in content.js says 'paste your Apps Script Web App URL here' — consider removing to strictly enforce env-var-only approach (matches security requirement).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reviews feature verified end-to-end. REVIEWS_API_URL intentionally empty; POST path graceful-fails with toast. No build folder exists (dev mode via CRA HMR).
